title: Sushi's Create Portal Integration
description: A datapack intended to integrate some popular dimension mods that didn't support Create trains
body:
I was tired of having so many dimension mods, where the portals didn't work with trains from Create. I couldn't figure out how to make them compatible, so I did the next best thing and recreated all the portals with Datapack Portals (custom portal API) to use the Train integration addon. 

All portals require a bucket of Dimensional Tears (aka Portal Fluid) from Spelunkery to activate. 

**Current supported dimensions:**  
- The Bumblezone  
- Exotelcraft  
- Liroth Revamped (Curseforge Link: [Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/liroth-revamped-forge),[Fabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/liroth-revamped-fabric))  
- The Nether (a new alternate portal that can be lit with a bucket of dimensional tears like the others, for consistency). Requires Rechiseled.   
- I have designed a train-compatible end portal as well, but portals to the End are currently buggy, so it is disabled. 

Please note that this is not a replacement for the existing portals! All portal frames are made of blocks only found within their dimension, so you will still need to go exploring and find them before you can send in trains.  
The only exception is the Nether, because so many Nether blocks can be automated that the restriction would be pointless. 

It has come to my attention that the Bumblezone train portal uses blocks that are not obtainable in survival. I'll be fixing this with a new recipe in a future update
